---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the requested capability.

## Use Case

What workflow or problem would this support?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the expected inputs, outputs, CLI behavior, or API behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

List any workarounds or other designs you considered.

## Contract Impact

Would this change schema versions, canonical JSON envelopes, CLI exit codes, or
package-root imports?
